title: BEM-866 poll existing Claude 2
objective:
Run script:
"""
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
report = Path('governance/reports/bem865_claude_write_selftest.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
report_text = report.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if report.exists() else ''
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
if ok:
    status = 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK_CONFIRMED'
elif report.exists() and 'Changed_files:' in report_text:
    status = 'REPORT_EXISTS_MAILBOX_WAITING'
else:
    status = 'WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_WRITE'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_POLL_EXISTING_CLAUDE_WRITE_2_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 poll existing Claude write 2\nStatus: ' + status + '\nResponse exists: ' + str(response.exists()) + '\nReport exists: ' + str(report.exists()) + '\nClaude write OK: ' + str(ok) + '\n\nResponse text:\n' + text[:2000] + '\n\nReport text:\n' + report_text[:2000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('poll existing Claude write 2: ' + status)
"""
